Nanjing AVW Electronics Co., Ltd. presents a chaotic history of corporate pivoting and relocation, currently existing as a defunct, zero-employee shell company. The initial 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been completely eradicated. Tracing its lineage, the entity was originally established in Shanghai, undergoing multiple drastic identity changes ('Shanghai Xuanyang Biotech', 'Xinyechao Intelligent Tech') before migrating to Nanjing's Jiangning High-tech Park. The physical data definitively exposes its current state: despite a 5 million RMB paid-in capital and a massive, buzzword-heavy business scope (encompassing smart equipment, optical instruments, and software), it reports exactly 0 insured employees and is registered in an office building ('Room 3564, R&D Building B'). It is physically impossible to manufacture optical glass or smart equipment with zero staff. Furthermore, the presence of external corporate emails ('@ioipchina.com', '@avwgroup.com') suggests this entity is merely a dormant shell or holding vehicle utilized by a broader corporate group (AVW Group / IOIP) for administrative, tax, or R&D park registration purposes, lacking any independent manufacturing capacity.
